_how_to_get_these: 4. Name it anything (e.g. 'PrevPoolChecker'). The 'Application Callback URL'
is not used for the client-credentials flow, so any value works (e.g.
5. Copy the Client ID and the generated Client Secret into the fields above.
6. Save this file as 'credentials.json' (NOT the .example one) in this folder.
credentials.json is gitignored so your secret stays local.
_notes: Optional. If present and valid, ingest.py uses the osu! API v2 (client-credentials grant, 'public' scope) to add beatmapset_id to tournament data quickly when you add a tournament. Without credentials it falls back to the credential-free /b/{id} redirect. check.py never needs credentials. Delete the _ fields if you like; only client_id and client_secret are read.
